cover.subtitle:
관리에게 토지를,
474년 이어진 분급 제도.
cover.imagePrompt: 10th-12th century Goryeo dynasty rural landscape illustration. Foreground: a Goryeo official in jade-green robe holding a land registry scroll, standing at the edge of terraced rice paddies and a small wooded hillside. Distant farmers tending fields. Color: jade-green + harvest gold + earth-brown. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE SCROLLS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 과전법 시행. 조선 토지 제도 토대.

items.name: 전지
items.desc: 곡식을 거둘 수 있는 토지의 분급.

outro.tip_headline:
"역분전 → 시정 → 개정 → 경정 → 과전법"
5단계 변천 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 전시과 4단계 변천(역분전·시정·개정·경정)과 각 시기 왕(태조·경종·목종·문종), 공음전(5품 이상 세습) 특징, 과전법으로 이어지는 흐름 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized aerial-view of divided rice paddies in geometric grid pattern, with a small scroll icon to the side suggesting land registry. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
